title: Sudden Expense Priority Checklist for the First 72 Hours
summary: A quick triage order to protect essentials when a surprise bill appears.
body: List every bill due in the next 30 days and mark housing, food, medications, and utilities as non-negotiable essentials.
Call the new bill issuer within two business days and ask for hardship terms before any payment is missed.
Pause optional subscriptions and auto-renewals for one month while cash flow stabilizes.
Document each call with date, representative name, and payment terms offered so you can compare options clearly.
Use a one-page weekly budget check-in to prevent one emergency bill from turning into multiple late fees.

seo.title: Sudden Expense First 72 Hours Checklist
seo.description: Prioritize essential spending and negotiate quickly after an unexpected expense.
